positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of intertwined bioluminescent flora and fauna, such as glowing root systems, ethereal butterflies, and stylized aquatic plants. The composition should feature a central, repeating pattern suitable for seamless textile printing, rendered in a dark jewel-toned palette (deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue) contrasted strongly with glowing cyan and magenta light sources. The style is neo-art deco botanical meets intricate Japanese woodblock print, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes and mesmerizing symmetry. The lighting is dramatic and focused, suggesting an underwater cavern setting. High resolution, graphic novel aesthetic, highly detailed.
